components.name: Wolf Pelt
components.description: A thick pelt from a wolf. Can be used for crafting armor.

components.name: Wolf Fang
components.description: A sharp fang from a wolf. May be useful for crafting.

components.name: Wolf Claw
components.description: A claw from a wolf. May be useful for crafting.

components.name: Wolf Hide
components.description: A hide from a wolf. May be useful for crafting.

components.name: Goblin Ear
components.description: A severed goblin ear. Can be turned in for rewards.

components.name: Arrow
components.description: A simple wooden arrow with a metal tip.

components.name: Rusty Armor
components.description: Old, rusty armor. Better than nothing.

components.name: Rusty Weapon
components.description: A rusty, worn weapon. Still sharp enough to cut.

components.name: Chief's Axe
components.description: A ceremonial axe wielded by the goblin chief.
